title: Heroic Losers
tmdbOverview: In a town in the Northwest of the province of Buenos Aires, a group of neighbors is organized to recover the economy of the area, but when the corralito is implemented in the country and they suffer a fraud, their hopes disappear. Now, they will unite to recover the lost money and give the blow of their lives to their greatest enemy.
synopsis: Heroic Losers is a 2019 comedy and thriller film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
